rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 3/10 and rest their verdict on the same job-relevant grounds: lack of deep Java/Kotlin/JVM and enterprise framework (Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate) expertise against a role demanding it, plus a stack centered on TypeScript/Node.js/DLang. The wording differs slightly (run-to-run paraphrasing of strengths and concerns) but no concern, score change, or reasoning keys off the relocation of the candidate's employers to Kenya. The demographic signal had no effect.
